title: Admin logs out and protected access is blocked
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin can log out and is redirected away from protected admin content afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the logout control
Navigate to /admin
Verify the login page is displayed
Verify protected admin content is not accessible

title: Sign out and return to login
description: An admin can log out from the dashboard and is redirected back to the login screen.
category: Admin Login Logout And Auth Gating

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin
Log out of the admin account
Verify the login screen is shown again

title: Admin signs in to the dashboard
description: Verifies that an admin can sign in from the login page and reach the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Admin logs out and is blocked from admin access
description: An admin can log out and is returned to the login screen when trying to access protected admin areas afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the form
Click the logout control
Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify protected admin access is no longer available

title: Auto-mark a contact message as read
description: An inbox user can open a new contact message and see it change to read automatically.

Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /admin/collections/contact-messages
Open a new contact message
Verify the message status changes to read

Fill in the admin email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Verify quick links to content and inbox sections are displayed

Open a new application
Mark the application as examined
Return to the list view

Verify the reviewed item remains listed

title: Archive a contact message from the inbox
description: An inbox user can archive a contact message with the quick action and see it reflected in the list.

title: Admin creates a hero slide and saves it to the list

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

Fill in the required hero slide text fields with valid content
Select a media asset for the hero slide
Save the hero slide
Verify the new hero slide appears in the hero slides list

title: Admin is rejected with invalid credentials
description: Verifies that invalid login credentials keep the user on the login page and show rejection feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/login
Fill in the admin email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify the login form remains available
Verify a login rejection message is visible
